release_notes: A rare, transient cloud-driver hiccup that the app already **recovers from automatically** (it reconnects and retries the read, which succeeds) was being logged as a scary "panic" WARNING. It now logs quietly at debug level when the retry succeeds; only a hiccup that *survives* the retry is surfaced. No behaviour change — the app was already handling it correctly; this just stops the alarming message for something that was never a problem.
